title: Mamp's Mobs & Meadows
description: A true to form Vanilla+ modpack. Expand's core minecraft without deviating from the spirit.
body:
Mamp's Mobs & Meadows purpose is to have a true to minecraft experience with some fun exploration additions along the way, it's not meant to be a multi-month playthough like other game changing modpacks.

NOTE: If you are trying to run this on a server here's what you'll need. THIS IS NOT A GUIDE, it's an info dump for people who may need niche details or specific help.

- Run a basic fabric server using
  - MC Version 1.20.1
  - Fabric Version 1.0.3 (latest as of April 20th, 2025)
  - Fabric Loader Version 0.16.12
- Once the server has started, and the EULA is accepted, temporarily stop the server.
- Locate the mods folder in your fabric server; paste in the mods from this modpack
- Once the mods are added, REMOVE the NOTEBOOK mod. This is strictly a client side mod and will keep your server from starting if you leave it.
- Launch your server a second time to initialize the mods, then stop it.
- Locate the config folder (should be in the same directory as the mods folder) and open the "expanded ecosphere" folder.
  - In this folder, open config.json5
  - Change "forceLargeBiomes": false, to "forceLargeBiomes": true,
- Go back to the main directory (with config & mod folders) and DELETE the WORLD file.
- Now you can run your server and you should be good to go.
